mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DDD_MATCH_RESULT ( RESULT_NUMBER, USER_NUMBER, DOG_ACTIVITY, DOG_SOCIALITY, DOG_INDEPENDENCE, DOG_BARKING, DOG_GROOMING, RESULT_CREATED_DATE ) VALUES ( #{resultNumber}, #{userNumber}, #{dogActivity}, #{dogSociality}, #{dogIndependence}, #{dogBarking}, #{dogGrooming}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT a.dog_number, a.dog_name, a.dog_breed, a.dog_archive_date, s.shelter_name, ( SELECT ai.archive_img_path FROM ddd_archive_img ai WHERE ai.dog_number = a.dog_number AND ai.archive_img_number = ( SELECT MIN(ai2.archive_img_number) FROM ddd_archive_img ai2 WHERE ai2.dog_number = a.dog_number ) ) AS archive_img_path FROM ddd_archive a LEFT JOIN ddd_user_shelter s ON a.user_number = s.user_number WHERE a.dog_number = #{dogNumber}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DDD_MATCH_RESULT WHERE USER_NUMBER = #{userNumber}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM DDD_MATCH_RESULT WHERE RESULT_NUMBER = ( SELECT RESULT_NUMBER FROM ( SELECT RESULT_NUMBER FROM DDD_MATCH_RESULT WHERE USER_NUMBER = #{userNumber} ORDER BY RESULT_CREATED_DATE ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT RESULT_NUMBER, USER_NUMBER, DOG_ACTIVITY, DOG_SOCIALITY, DOG_INDEPENDENCE, DOG_BARKING, DOG_GROOMING, TO_CHAR(RESULT_CREATED_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS RESULT_CREATED_DATE FROM DDD_MATCH_RESULT WHERE USER_NUMBER = #{userNumber} ORDER BY RESULT_NUMBER DESC
SELECT dog_number, dog_activity, dog_sociality, dog_independence, dog_barking, dog_grooming FROM ddd_archive_score
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DDD_MATCH_RESULT_DOG ( RESULT_DOG_NUMBER, RESULT_NUMBER, DOG_NUMBER, RESULT_RANK ) VALUES ( SEQ_MATCH_RESULT_DOG.NEXTVAL, #{resultNumber}, #{dogNumber}, #{resultRank} )
mapper.select: SELECT DOG_NUMBER FROM DDD_MATCH_RESULT_DOG WHERE RESULT_NUMBER = #{resultNumber} ORDER BY RESULT_RANK ASC
SELECT RESULT_NUMBER, USER_NUMBER, DOG_ACTIVITY, DOG_SOCIALITY, DOG_INDEPENDENCE, DOG_BARKING, DOG_GROOMING, RESULT_CREATED_DATE FROM DDD_MATCH_RESULT WHERE RESULT_NUMBER = #{resultNumber}
